title: Element Inventory Row
description: One chemical element's planetary reality: crustal abundance + global run-rate, distilled into a scarcity penalty an AI design agent uses to reject scarce-material geometry before it reaches the grader (claude-skills#205).

crustal_abundance_ppm.description: A_c: average crustal abundance in parts per million by mass.

annual_run_rate_tonnes.description: Global annual production/run-rate in metric tonnes (0 = effectively not produced).

scarcity_penalty.description: Optional precomputed 0..1 triage weight (0 = abundant, 1 = extremely scarce). If absent the validator derives it from crustal_abundance_ppm.

abundant_substitutes.description: Suggested abundant-atom alternatives for the common engineering use, e.g. Au->[Cu, Al] for an EMI coat.

gateable_today.description: True if a MakerBench seed can enforce a scarcity penalty on this element today (abundance is static and known).
